title: ANC wins Ward 3 by narrowest of margins
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYNSA NEWS - In yesterday’s closely contested by- election in Ward 3, ANC candidate Lukhanyiso Nohana secured a narrow victory with 1 074 votes - just 31 votes ahead of the Patriotic Alliance’s Beauty Charlie, who received 1 043 votes.","html":"KNYNSA NEWS - In yesterday’s closely contested by- election in Ward 3, ANC candidate Lukhanyiso Nohana secured a narrow victory with 1 074 votes - just 31 votes ahead of the Patriotic Alliance’s Beauty Charlie, who received 1 043 votes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Land Party and the AUF trailed far behind with 15 and 14 votes respectively."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ward 3, which includes the Nekkies area, was previously held by Speaker Mncedisi Skosana.","html":"Ward 3, which includes the Nekkies area, was previously held by Speaker Mncedisi Skosana."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His tenure ended after he was removed from office by Western Cape Local Government MEC Anton Bredell, following an investigation into councillor conduct related to illegal payments to political appointees.","html":"His tenure ended after he was removed from office by Western Cape Local Government MEC Anton Bredell, following an investigation into councillor conduct related to illegal payments to political appointees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The DA, EFF, and KIM did not participate in the by-election.","html":"The DA, EFF, and KIM did not participate in the by-election."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: ANC wins Ward 3 by narrowest of margins
